F0.rationale: ACP now has the baseline README/ignore/runtime/secret-scan floor in source; PM floor ownership remains presence-only.

P0.rationale: ACP is the operator/gateway/workflow control-plane repo; a local verify and enforced handoff gate are preconditions for every deeper guard.

S1.rationale: ACP owns authority-bearing workflow, route, dispatch, and persistence boundaries; illegal states should be modeled at workflow definitions and route admission points rather than left to prose.

S2.rationale: The Bun workspace has repeated package, route, CLI, and store shapes; pattern dominance exists but scaffolds would lower agent construction error.

S3.rationale: Agents enter through AGENTS.md/README and public docs; current surface references are now guarded against live source drift.

S3.affordanceGating.rationale: ACP hosts gateways and capability surfaces where stale affordance disclosure can mislead agents, but dynamic prompt-surface pruning was not proven in this pass.

S4.rationale: Boundary and manifest guards are in the verify path and must retain teaching diagnostics.

S5.rationale: The repo has lint/type suppressions and structural guards; suppressions must stay task-linked and budgeted.

S6.rationale: ACP is local-first infrastructure; the handoff gate is the local verify chain enforced by hooks, not a remote PR service.

S7.rationale: ACP exposes CLI, HTTP, capability, package, and gateway surfaces; stale public/docs surface must fail mechanically.

S8.rationale: The current guard set is small enough to keep adding rules deliberately; future guard growth needs an explicit rule/why/exception cut line.

TA.rationale: ACP role authorization and separation-of-duties are first-class correctness properties.

TB.rationale: Gateway, server, Discord, workflow, managed-resource, and validation work relies on procedures agents must invoke without re-explanation.

TC.rationale: ACP accumulates cross-gateway and workflow lessons and now has a guarded local enablement changelog carrier.

TD.rationale: A large control-plane repo needs executable discovery for entry points, route ownership, package boundaries, and command surfaces.

TD.selfDescribingSurfaceConformance.rationale: The installed acp CLI and HTTP routes are agent-facing control surfaces; stale help or prose command inventories cause incorrect actions.

TE.rationale: Workflow and gateway behavior use conformance suites and real smoke rules as requirements; this is central to ACP correctness.

TF.rationale: ACP is explicitly a control plane over sessions, inputs, jobs, wrkf task facades, runs, effects, and gateway deliveries.
